title: TikTok AI Creative Suite
body: Modern social platforms reward variety, volume, and cultural relevance, but enterprise advertisers were still operating on a linear creative model built for TV: long lead times, few hero assets, fragmented teams. Working with TikTok's Creative Lab, I led the AI Creative Product Marketing strategy to bring Symphony Creative Suite and Smart+ inside the creative supply chains of the world's largest advertisers. The goal was a continuous creative model. An always-on engine that produces relevant content at the speed of the platform, with measurement woven through it.

The work centered on four pillars. A portfolio content mix that balances Professionally Generated Content, User and Creator Generated Content, and AI Generated Content so brands have variety without losing brand integrity. An enterprise rollout playbook for verticalized teams, with cross-functional roles (Planners, Innovators, Approvers, Creators, Community Builders, Adapters) mapped to each organization. A Symphony and Smart+ integration plan covering versioning, avatar narration, on-the-fly dubbing, and predictive campaign optimization. And a flywheel: real-time performance data feeding the next round of creative briefs, so every asset improves the next.

Brands of this size carry real exposure when AI moves into the creative supply chain, so the rollout had to balance speed with safeguards. Brand-safe model fine-tuning, human approval gates at the right stages, IP and likeness protections built into avatar workflows, and clear governance for what AI should and should not touch. The result is a system that scales without sacrificing quality, where AI handles versioning, translation, and optimization, while humans hold the strategy, taste, and cultural judgment.

Unilever became the global proof point. They rolled out their Desire at Scale growth model on top of TikTok Symphony and Smart+, building in-house Sketch Pro design studios that work alongside brand teams to identify the right AI tools and produce high-quality assets in a fraction of the time. Marketing assets now ship up to 30% faster. In Indonesia, a lip-synch Ramadan trend went live within hours, delivered over 6 million organic views, and lifted TikTok visibility for Rinso and Sunlight by 22.5 percent. AI-generated content there has doubled Video Completion Rate and Click-Through Rate, turning relevance itself into a measurable growth engine.
Allbriton Robbins - AI Creative Product Marketing strategy and enterprise rollout
TikTok Creative Lab - research, supply-chain modeling, and partner enablement
